title: Emily through to national performing arts competition
description: GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - Union High School is...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - Union High School is proud of Emily Raath, a Grade 7 learner who has advanced to the national finals of the prestigious South African Championships of Performing Arts (Sacopa) following a series of remarkable performances at the recent semi-final auditions.","html":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - Union High School is proud of Emily Raath, a Grade 7 learner who has advanced to the national finals of the prestigious South African Championships of Performing Arts (Sacopa) following a series of remarkable performances at the recent semi-final auditions."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Sacopa, held in regional rounds across the country, highlights some of South Africa’s most talented and promising young performers."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Emily stood out with her exceptional vocal talent, earning her a place in the solo vocals category at the national finals, which will take place in Rustenburg from 3 to 11 October.","html":"Emily stood out with her exceptional vocal talent, earning her a place in the solo vocals category at the national finals, which will take place in Rustenburg from 3 to 11 October."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"During the semi-finals in De Aar this past weekend, Emily competed across four vocal genres, impressing judges with her versatility, emotional range and technical skill.","html":"During the semi-finals in De Aar this past weekend, Emily competed across four vocal genres, impressing judges with her versatility, emotional range and technical skill."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Her performances captured the spirit of each genre and demonstrated the heart and dedication she pours into her singing.","html":"Her performances captured the spirit of each genre and demonstrated the heart and dedication she pours into her singing."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Securing a spot in the national finals brings Emily one step closer to an incredible opportunity – joining team South Africa and representing the country at the World Championships of Performing Arts (WCOPA) in Los Angeles, an international platform where young artists compete at the highest level.","html":"Securing a spot in the national finals brings Emily one step closer to an incredible opportunity – joining team South Africa and representing the country at the World Championships of Performing Arts (WCOPA) in Los Angeles, an international platform where young artists compete at the highest level."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
